name: Tisane Labs
description: Tisane Labs — NLP content moderation API detecting hate speech, cyberbullying, personal attacks, and sexual content in 30+ languages.

seo.title: Tisane Labs — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Tisane Labs: Tisane Labs — NLP content moderation API detecting hate speech, cyberbullying, personal attacks, and sexual content in 30+ languages.

when_to_use: Running multilingual abuse detection in 30+ languages via API
Detecting hate speech, threats, and spam in global user content
Building multilingual moderation systems for international platforms
Analyzing forum content for hostile and policy-violating language

cons: Docs and SDKs less polished than big players
review.verdict: Underrated linguistic moderation API especially strong in non-English languages; worth evaluating for global apps.
review.best_for: Global UGC platforms needing nuanced text moderation across many languages.
review.not_for: Image, video, or audio moderation needs, or English-only US apps.
